# KineticRecruiter
> AI-powered applicant tracking system for recruitment agencies

## About
KineticRecruiter is an AI-powered ATS built specifically for recruitment agencies. It features semantic candidate search, explainable match scoring, AI career highlights, and a built-in client CRM. Pricing starts at $29/month with all AI features included at every tier. A 7-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

## Key Pages
- [Homepage](https://kineticrecruiter.com/)
- [Features](https://kineticrecruiter.com/features/ai-candidate-intelligence)
- [Pricing](https://kineticrecruiter.com/pricing)
- [Blog](https://kineticrecruiter.com/blog)
- [Compare](https://kineticrecruiter.com/compare)
- [Contact](https://kineticrecruiter.com/contact)

## Key Facts
- Category: AI-Powered Applicant Tracking System (ATS)
- Target Users: Recruitment agencies and staffing firms (1-50 recruiters)
- Core Features: Semantic candidate search, AI match scoring (0-100), AI career highlights, client CRM, AI job description generation
- Pricing: From $29/month, transparent tiers, no per-feature add-ons
- Free Trial: 7 days, no credit card required
- Platform: Web-based SaaS
